svg.aria-label: System map of the nix config: two hosts, edge routing, services, theme, mux, secrets
svg.text: · one flake, two machines, the whole stack
nix-darwin macbook + NixOS on an NVIDIA DGX Spark, sharing one package universe
llama.cpp on the GPU, loopback only
no open web ports · no ACME
TLS terminates at the edge · tunnel to loopback · Host-header dispatch
mosh in, land in your session
owner edits apply live, no rebuild
age recipients from ssh host keys
